calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-08-2011 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-23-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-23-2010 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Sep-20-11 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 to place the settlement agreement of the parties on the record.
Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Lorna A. Walker, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bel Air Time Corporation, a corporation.
Bill Gruttemeyer, salesmen for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
Defendant Ali Sabahi, an individual, dba Puffins, was placed under oath and examined.
Defaults were entered against defendants Puffins, a partnership, and Debra Sabahi, an individual, dba Puffins, were entered on January 27, 2010.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on March 3, 2010, which set trial for June 21, 2010. Order granting motion to continue trial date was filed on June 21, 2010, which set trial for today, August 23, 2010.

Settlement agreement between the parties was placed on the record by Ms. Walker. In accordance with the terms of the agreement, defendant Ali Sabahi shall pay plaintiff Bel Air Time corporation the sum of $2,000.00 as follows: $200.00 on September 1, 2010, and $200.00 on the first of each month thereafter until paid in full. Said monthly payments shall be paid directly to plaintiff's counsel, payable to plaintiff. If defendant complies with the terms of this agreement, plaintiff will dismiss this action as to all defendants.

If defendant Ali Sabahi, an individual dba Puffins, fails to comply with the terms set forth above, plaintiff may, upon exparte application, obtain judgment against defendant for outstanding balance of $2,500.00, plus accrued interest, attorney fees and costs in the amount of $385.00.

Defendant and Mr. Gruttemeyer were voir dired by the Court and Ms. Walker, respectfully, as to the terms of the agreement. Matter is continued to September 20, 20101 @ 10:00 a.m. in Depart. 212 on the CRC 3.185 Dismissal Calendar.

Terms of this agreement shall be reduced to writing by Ms. Walker.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-17-2010 Continued To Aug-23-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-17-2010 Text Ruling

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Apr-09-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT ALI SABAHI MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND. Appearances: Defendant Ali Sabahi appearing in Pro Per. Mr. Sabahi failed to give notice, pursuant to San Francisco Local Rule 8.3.The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion denied without prejudice. Ali Sabahi is not an attorney and lacks standing to vacate the default against Ruffins and Debra Sabahi. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-03-2010 Set For Trial On Jun-21-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
